title: 你想要多大的房子？
pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng yào duō dà de fángzi?
titleTranslation_en: How big an apartment do you want?
description_uz: «Uy topdingmi?» — do'sting bilan ijaraga uy, xonalar, narx va joylashuv haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog talab aytish, narxni solishtirish va ko'rikni rejalashtirishni mashq qiladi. Hayotiy mavzu va uy izlashda kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Rolni o'ynab takrorlash va gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Ты нашёл жильё?» — разговор с другом об аренде квартиры, комнатах, цене и расположении. Этот диалог отрабатывает, как назвать требования, сравнить цену и договориться о просмотре. Жизненная тема и полезные слова для поиска жилья. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «Have you found a place yet?» — a chat with a friend about renting a flat, the rooms, the price, and the location. This dialogue practises stating requirements, comparing prices, and arranging a viewing. A real-life topic with words you'll need when flat-hunting. Great for role-play and building speaking confidence.

sentences.text_original: 听说你要租房子，找到了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tīng shuō nǐ yào zū fáng zi, zhǎo dào le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Eshitishimcha uy ijaraga olmoqchi ekansan, topdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard you're renting an apartment — have you found one?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没有。昨天看了一间，不太满意。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi yǒu. Zuó tiān kàn le yì jiān, bú tài mǎn yì.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q. Kecha bittasini ko'rdim, unchalik yoqmadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Вчера посмотрел одну, не очень понравилась.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. I saw one yesterday, but I wasn't too satisfied.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wèi shén me? Fáng zi bù hǎo ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why? Was the apartment not good?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 房子还可以，但是太小了。
sentences.pinyin: Fáng zi hái kě yǐ, dàn shì tài xiǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: Uy yomon emas, lekin juda kichkina.
sentences.text_translation_en: The apartment's okay, but it's too small.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng yào duō dà de fáng zi?
sentences.text_translation_en: How big an apartment do you want?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一个卧室、一个客厅，还要有厨房。
sentences.pinyin: Yí gè wò shì, yí gè kè tīng, hái yào yǒu chú fáng.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta yotoqxona, bitta mehmonxona, yana oshxona ham kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Одна спальня, одна гостиная и ещё кухня.
sentences.text_translation_en: One bedroom, one living room, and it also needs a kitchen.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那间一个月两千五，不包水电。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiān yí gè yuè liǎng qiān wǔ, bù bāo shuǐ diàn.
sentences.text_translation: O'sha xona oyiga ikki ming besh yuz, suv va elektr puli kirmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Та — две тысячи пятьсот в месяц, без воды и электричества.
sentences.text_translation_en: That one is two thousand five hundred a month, not including water and electricity.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎng zhù zài nǎ ge qū?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В каком районе ты хочешь жить?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which district do you want to live in?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Shì zhōng xīn, lí gōng sī jìn yì diǎn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В центре города, поближе к работе.
sentences.text_translation_en: The city center, a bit closer to the company.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Shì zhōng xīn de fáng zi guì bu guì?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are apartments in the city center expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn guì, dàn shì hěn fāng biàn.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit expensive, but very convenient.
sentences.speaker: B
